summary: Tested the /leave-if-interested endpoint bug fix for the race condition where users got stuck as 'interested' after exit-lobby → back-to-lobby flow. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend flows verified: (1) Exit Lobby + Back to Lobby correctly removes user, (2) Joining user who navigates away without Exit Lobby stays in session.

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing 'session' dependency at line 402 - non-critical

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in SessionPage.jsx line 402 about missing 'session' dependency in useEffect - recommend adding // eslint-disable-next-line comment if intentional
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created dynamically during testing with unique UUIDs - no persistent seed data required
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /leave-if-interested endpoint and frontend cleanup logic is working correctly. Key behaviors verified: (1) Interested users are removed on navigate away, (2) Joining/in_lobby users are NOT removed unless they clicked Exit Lobby first, (3) Host is never removed. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_leave_if_interested.py

frontend: Enter session → Commit to joining → Exit Lobby → Back to Lobby → User removed - PASSED
Enter session → Commit to joining → Back to Lobby (no Exit Lobby) → User stays - PASSED
Nickname prompt and session navigation - PASSED
